src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/Ca.general_idea: Add 'descripcion' field to the Capitulo entity to store chapter description.
Add 'link' field to the Capitulo entity to store a link associated with the chapter.

src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/Pe.general_idea: Changed the parent class of Pelicula from Contenido to Base to restructure the entity hierarchy.
Added specific fields (nombre, visible, descripcion, imagen, año, actores, link) to the Pelicula entity that were likely previously in the parent class or missing.
Added a ManyToMany relationship with Categoria to associate movies with categories.
Added a ManyToMany relationship with Familia to associate movies with families.
Added necessary imports for the new JPA annotations and Java collections used in the entity.
Remove unused import for java.sql.Blob as the field type was changed.
Change the image field type from Blob to String, likely to store a URL or path instead of binary data.
Rename the join column name from usuario_id to perfil_id in the watchlist_serie relationship to match the entity name.
Rename the join column name from usuario_id to perfil_id in the watchlist_pelicula relationship to match the entity name.

src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/Se.general_idea: Added a ManyToMany relationship with Categoria to categorize series.
Added a ManyToMany relationship with Familia to group series into families.

src/main/java/com/api/tellix/entities/Te.general_idea: Remove the 'capitulos' field and its JPA column annotation from the Temporada entity.
